positive: A mystical, stylized illustration of a celestial compass surrounded by glowing nebula particles and constellations. The compass is geometrically perfect, featuring ornate brass detailing and vibrant sapphire blue elements. Elements include stylized zodiac signs forming an orbit, delicate winged mythological creatures (griffins/sphinxes), and floating glyphs of ancient wisdom. The composition should be highly symmetrical, centered, and designed for optimal visual appeal on fabric. Use a deep indigo, electric blue, gold, and subtle emerald color palette. The style should be neo-art deco mixed with bioluminescent fantasy art, rendered with sharp, clean lines and high contrast, resembling intricate stained glass mixed with modern vector illustration. Flat, solid silhouettes are preferred, with light emanating softly from the glowing elements. High detail, vector graphic quality.
negative: text, logo, watermark, signature, messy, blurry, noise, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cartoon, sketch, realistic photo, low resolution, grain, sepia, monochrome
